findings.location: 自動設定項目の指定(Entityの編集) section (entire section absent)
findings.description: The entire '自動設定項目の指定(Entityの編集)' section is missing from the knowledge file. This section contains decision-necessary information: (1) @UserId annotation — auto-sets login user ID on member variables; (2) @CurrentDateTime annotation — auto-sets timestamp on member variables; (3) code example showing SystemAccountEntity with insertUserId, insertDate, updatedUserId, updatedDate annotated; (4) important constraint in SQL comments that even when values are auto-set, the column name and :fieldName binding must still be explicitly listed in the SQL INSERT statement.
findings.source_evidence: Source section '自動設定項目の指定(Entityの編集)' with annotations table and SystemAccountEntity code block and CM311AC1Component.sql comments like '-- 【説明】自動設定されるのは値なので、項目の指定は必要'

findings.location: ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成 section (entire section absent)
findings.description: The entire 'ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成' section is missing. This section contains: (1) single-insert flow — create Entity → getParameterizedSqlStatement → executeUpdateByObject; (2) batch-insert flow — create Entity → getParameterizedSqlStatement → addBatchObject (repeated) → executeBatch; (3) WARNING that for large data, executeBatch must be called at appropriate intervals to avoid OutOfMemoryError and GC-induced performance degradation, and programmers must check the architecture design document for the interval; (4) note that the logic is extracted to a Component because it is shared across multiple transactions (hence Form is not an argument); (5) SQL file content for INSERT_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT and INSERT_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_AUTHORITY; (6) Java code for CM311AC1Component extending DbAccessSupport with registerSystemAccount (executeUpdateByObject, DuplicateStatementException handling) and registerSystemAccountAuthority (addBatchObject loop + executeBatch).
findings.source_evidence: Source section 'ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成' including warning block: '大量のデータを一括処理する場合は、適宜ParameterizedSqlPStatement#executeBatchを実行すること。この処理を行わないと、メモリ不足、gc頻発による性能劣化の原因となることがある。' and full SQL/Java code blocks

findings.description: The entire 'Actionの作成' section is missing. This section contains: (1) @OnDoubleSubmission annotation with path = "forward://RW11AC0201" applied to doRW11AC0204; (2) @OnError annotation for ApplicationException forwarding to RW11AC0201; (3) important constraint: even when transitioning from the confirmation screen, input data stored in hidden tags on the client side may have been tampered with, so re-validation (validate(req)) is mandatory; (4) concrete Java code example for doRW11AC0204 showing both annotations and the re-validation call.
findings.source_evidence: Source section '.. _07_actionClassCreate:' / 'Actionの作成': '入力データは、カスタムタグを使用することでクライアント側(hiddenタグ)に保持しているため...確認画面から遷移した場合でも入力データは改竄される恐れがあるため、本メソッドにおいて再度バリデーションを行う必要がある。' and @OnDoubleSubmission code block

findings.description: The entire 'JSPの作成' section is missing. This section contains: (1) reference to W11AC0201.jsp implementation; (2) explicit note that since the sample application uses the shared input/confirmation JSP feature (06_sharingInputAndConfirmationJsp), the useToken attribute does not need to be specified in the JSP.
findings.source_evidence: Source section '.. _07_jsp:' / 'JSPの作成': 'サンプルアプリケーションでは、入力画面と確認画面のJSPを共通化する機能を使用しているので、useToken属性を指定しなくてよい。' and literalinclude of W11AC0201.jsp

findings.description: The knowledge file has 5 sections (s1–s5) but the source contains at least 8 distinct content headings that warrant separate sections: 本項で説明する内容, 作成手順, JavaScriptを使用した二重サブミットの防止, トークンを使用した二重サブミットの防止, まとめ, 自動設定項目の指定(Entityの編集), ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成, Actionの作成, JSPの作成. Four implementation sections (自動設定項目の指定, ビジネスロジック, Action, JSP) are entirely absent.
